title: SecurityRuleDocument
description: The persisted form of a named row-authorization rule (design §14.2): the rule expression plus audit and optimistic-concurrency metadata. Backends store this document verbatim.

expression.description: The rule text in the security-rule grammar.

createdBy.description: The actor that created the rule.

lastUpdatedBy.description: The actor that last updated the rule, if any.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When the rule was last updated, if ever.
